candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above operating profit, but it is a single company-wide operating D&A row and is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales specific. Relative to the selected COGS row 'Raw materials and consumables used', it appears outside that bucket, but assigning the full row to COGS would risk misclassification and double counting across operating buckets.

variables.notes: Visible D&A is separate from the selected COGS row, but the excerpt does not indicate what portion, if any, belongs specifically to COGS.

candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above operating profit and not clearly nested within the selected XSGA rows. However, it is a generic total operating D&A row rather than an SG&A-specific D&A row, so adding it entirely to XSGA would risk overstating SG&A and double counting against COGS/other operating buckets.

variables.notes: The only visible D&A row is a consolidated operating D&A line with no SG&A-specific label. Conservative treatment is to avoid adding it separately to XSGA without clearer bucket attribution.
